Command_En: Pretend to shiver because it is very cold outside!
Command_Zh: 假裝因為外面很冷而發抖！

column6: 大聲地說 'Tell me a story, Uncle!'

Command_En: Pretend to explore a dark forest!
Command_Zh: 假裝在探索一個黑暗的森林！

Command_En: Look around excitedly like you found a cave!
Command_Zh: 興奮地四處看，就像你找到了一個山洞！

Command_En: Pretend to dig in the field with a shovel.
Command_Zh: 假裝拿著鏟子在田裡挖土。

Command_En: Make an angry face like Ben's older brothers.
Command_Zh: 做一個像 Ben 哥哥們一樣生氣的表情。

Command_En: Whisper softly like a small dragon!
Pretend to tie a bandage on a hurt wing!
Command_Zh: 假裝在受傷的翅膀上綁繃帶！

Command_En: Look up and pretend to catch a falling book!
Command_Zh: 抬頭看，假裝接住一本掉下來的書！

Command_En: Laugh and laugh because you feel so lucky!
Command_Zh: 因為覺得自己太幸運了，開心地大笑起來！

Command_En: Pretend to drink a cup of hot chocolate.
Say 'Where is our dinner?' with an angry voice.
Command_Zh: 用生氣的聲音說 'Where is our dinner?'

Command_En: Pretend to fight over a silver cup.
Command_Zh: 假裝在搶奪一個銀杯子。
露出非常震驚的表情，因為所有的東西都消失了！

Command_En: Pretend to write a story in a book.
Smile and say 'Perhaps it was Ben.'
Command_Zh: 微笑著說 'Perhaps it was Ben.'
